entries.result: the archive declined to distinguish the duplicate from the original
light remains on in rooms remembered as dark; maintenance closed the ticket anyway
badge echo delayed by 2.1 seconds; temporary absence preserved
all clocks agree with themselves; no statement is made regarding each other
mirror cover compliant; covered surface continues to behave like a window
form accepted in damp condition; drying would change the filing date
the corridor accepted the request and then changed which side the door was on
one reflection answered late; no disciplinary event is created by lateness alone
